case_title: CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS REALTY CORP VS. KUN SAM KIM

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS REALTY CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, KUN SAM AN INDIVIDUAL $17,500,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250,274.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,750,274.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
